name: DexVault
description: DexVault - Organize Your Collections. Interactive index for physical media (DVD, Blu-ray, 4K UHD, CDs).
author: Renault John Lecoultre

scripts.dev:backend: nodemon --watch backend/src --watch backend/index.js --watch data --watch deployment.dev.json --delay 2 --exec "node dev-backend.js"
scripts.docker:publish: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t ghcr.io/renajohn/filmdex:latest -t ghcr.io/renajohn/filmdex:$(node scripts/get-version.js) --push .
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
